chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-426 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No. 7395/2025 2. For order on CMA No. 10072/2023 3. For order on CMA No. 10073/2023 4. For hearing of CMA No. 3292/2017 5. For hearing of CMA No. 2097/2017 6. For hearing of main case 22.05.2025 Mr. Salahuddin Ahmed advocate for the petitioner Ms. Zehra Sehar Assistant Attorney General Mr. Mehboob Shah advocate for respondents No.2, 3 and 5 -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The petitioner an officer of Karachi Port Trust (KPT) was issued show cause notices dated 20.0.2017 and 24.03.2023 by KPT based upon a complaint made against him. This Court had originally stayed first show cause notice vide order dated 24.01.2017, as prima facie it might not been issued by the correct Authority. Since then i.e. for over 08 years no progress has been made in this case. We have learned counsel for the parties and have perused the record. We set aside both the aforesaid show cause notices mentioned in this order and remand the matter to the Board of Trustees of KPT with direction to initiate denovo proceedings, if deems necessary, strictly in accordance with law and complete the enquiry and make requisite findings within three months from the date of this order, after affording an opportunity of personal hearing to the petitioner, through a speaking order. It is made clear that the petitioner shall participate in the enquiry proceeding and render whatever assistance required from him. Copy of this order shall be sent to Chairman, Board of Trustees of KPT for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with all pending applications.

Copy of this order shall be sent to Chairman, Board of Trustees of KPT for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
